name: IdsCchgMultCatGrpRplcLoad

text.value: WITH source_data AS (SELECT stg.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK, stg.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, stg.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, stg.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, stg.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_1_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_2_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_3_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_6_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_7_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_8_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_9_SK, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, stg.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, stg.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, '@{pipeline().parameters.VersionId}' AS VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.df6d18_TMP_IdsCchgMultCatGrpRplcLoad stg) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC AS tgt USING source_data s ON tgt.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK = s.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tgt.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID = s.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, tgt.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = s.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, tgt.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = s.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, tgt.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = s.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_1_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_1_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_2_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_2_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_3_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_3_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_6_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_6_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_7_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_7_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_8_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_8_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_9_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_9_SK, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, tgt.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC = s.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, tgt.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX = s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, tgt.VRSN_ID = s.VRSN_ID WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_1_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_2_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_3_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_6_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_7_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_8_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_9_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, VRSN_ID) VALUES (s.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK, s.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, s.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, s.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, s.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_1_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_2_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_3_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_6_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_7_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_8_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_9_SK, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, s.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, s.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, s.VRSN_ID);

Description:
CALLED BY: CblTalnCchgLoadSeq

PROCESSING:  Loads data into CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP table and rejected records into a Rej file. 
                                                                
     
MODIFICATIONS:

Update Term date for old records in After load SQL
Read Load File created in the FKEY job
Tfrm Version Id
Load CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC table
Load rejects are redirected into a Reject file
